name: @gmft/landlock-shim
description: N-API binding to Linux's landlock LSM. Forked from mscdex/landlock@0.0.1 to drop the Nan dependency so it loads on Node 22+ through Node 26. See docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-17-gmft-v0.2-D-host-sandbox.md ADR-0011 and packages/landlock-shim/README.md for the rationale.
